Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: A travel bookkeeping expense entry representing money spent during the Okinawa trip.

date.description: The date when the expense was incurred (YYYY-MM-DD).

description.description: Detailed description of what was purchased.

amountJpy.description: The transaction amount in Japanese Yen (JPY).

amountTwd.description: The calculated transaction amount in New Taiwan Dollars (TWD).

createdAt.description: The epoch timestamp when the expense was recorded.

Memo.title: Memo
Memo.description: A trip note or memo that can contain text, tags, and base64 encoded photo/receipt data.

date.description: The date of the memo entry.

content.description: Detailed text content of the memo.

imageUrl.description: A base64 encoded string representing an uploaded receipt or photo.

tags.description: A list of tags categorizing the memo.

createdAt.description: The epoch timestamp when the memo was recorded.

/memos/{memoId}.description: Collection of all travel memos and receipt notes.
